experience.label: What awaits you?
experience.title: The 360° Experience
experience.description: Our tours are much more than a visit. They are a full immersion in the best of Colombia: adventure, nature, local gastronomy, and wellness, with the option of controlled, completely optional recreational consumption.

features.title: Outdoor Adventure
features.description: Hiking, adventure sports, and tours through Colombia's most breathtaking landscapes.

features.title: Local Gastronomy
features.description: Savor Colombian cuisine crafted by local chefs with fresh ingredients from each region.

features.title: Nature & Landscapes
features.description: Explore nature reserves, farms, and exclusive destinations surrounded by biodiversity.

features.title: Exclusive Community
features.description: Connect with other club members in a safe, private, and vibrant environment.

features.title: Sensory Experience
features.description: Spaces designed to stimulate all your senses in harmony with Colombia's natural beauty.

features.title: Integral Wellness
features.description: Relaxation sessions, guided meditation, and wellness activities in natural settings.

packages.label: Book your experience
packages.title: Packages and Tours
packages.subtitle: Choose the package that fits you best. Every tour includes transportation, meals, and an unforgettable guided experience across Colombia.
packages.error: We couldn't load the tour packages.
packages.emptyDescription: We're preparing incredible experiences for you. Soon you'll be able to book your recreational tour across Colombia.

security.label: Security & Trust
security.title: 100% Legal and Safe Operation
security.subtitle: Your peace of mind is our priority. We operate with the highest standards of legal compliance, safety, and quality to guarantee an exceptional, worry-free experience.

features.title: Legal Framework & Transparency
features.description: We operate under the Colombian legal framework with all required licenses. Transparent contracts, clear terms, and complete documentation available.

features.title: Privacy & Quality
features.description: Your data is secure with bank-level encryption. Rigorous quality and safety processes at every stage of our experiences.

features.title: Expert Guides
features.description: Trained and certified staff guaranteeing a safe, fun, and memorable experience on every tour.

features.title: Comprehensive Insurance
features.description: Insurance coverage for every participant throughout the entire tour experience, from start to finish.

testimonials.label: Voices of the Experience
testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover the stories of those who have lived the {{siteName}} experience. Every testimonial reflects our commitment to quality, safety, and fun.

items.name: María González
items.content: A transformative experience. The tour allowed me to discover incredible Colombian landscapes and connect with wonderful people in a safe and professional environment. I'll be back for sure.

items.name: Carlos Rodríguez
items.content: As a nature lover, I was impressed by the destinations and the flawless organization. Every detail was carefully planned. Definitely a top-tier experience.

items.name: Ana Sofía Martínez
items.content: The local gastronomy was a revelation. Every dish told a story from the region and the presentation was flawless. A complete sensory experience.

items.name: Diego Herrera
items.content: Excellent balance between adventure and relaxation. The guides are experts and know how to adapt activities to each group's pace. Highly recommended.

items.name: Laura Valencia
items.content: Professionalism and passion in every detail. The tour gave me a completely new perspective on recreational tourism in Colombia. A must-do.

items.name: Sebastián Mora
items.content: The fusion of regional gastronomy and outdoor activities is fascinating. I discovered flavors and ingredients I'm already incorporating into my kitchen. A unique experience.

faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Get your answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our recreational tours across Colombia. If you have any additional questions, don't hesitate to contact us.
faq.imageAlt: Frequently asked questions about recreational tours

items.question: What kind of activities do the tours include?
items.answer: Our tours include recreational activities such as hiking, scenic nature walks, local gastronomy experiences, wellness and relaxation activities. We also offer the option of controlled, completely optional recreational consumption for those who wish.

items.question: What does the tour include?
items.answer: Our tours include transportation from designated meeting points, guided tours, recreational activities, local gastronomy tastings, informational materials, and a participation certificate. Premium packages include a full lunch and exclusive benefits.

items.question: Is recreational consumption mandatory?
items.answer: No, not at all. Recreational consumption is completely optional and never mandatory. Our tours are designed to be fully enjoyed without any consumption. It's simply an additional option available in a controlled, safe environment.

items.question: How long is the tour?
items.answer: Duration depends on the selected package: Express Tours (3-4 hours), Standard Tours (5-6 hours), and Premium Tours (full day, 8 hours). All include time for transport, tours, activities, and breaks.

items.question: Can I take photos during the tour?
items.answer: Yes, you can take photos in designated areas. For participant safety and privacy, there are restricted zones where cameras aren't permitted. Our guides will show you when and where you can take photos.

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: We recommend comfortable clothing, closed hiking-appropriate shoes, sunscreen, camera, and a water bottle. For full-day tours, we suggest bringing extra snacks.

items.question: Are there age restrictions?
items.answer: Yes, our tours are exclusively for participants 18+. ID will be required at the start of the tour. This restriction applies to everyone with no exceptions.

items.question: How do I book?
items.answer: You can book directly on our website by selecting the desired package and available date. You can also contact us via WhatsApp or phone for personalized assistance. Reservations are confirmed with a 30% upfront payment.
